name: So Easy Banana Caramel Pie (Alternate for Moc
recipeInstructions:
1. Early in the day: In a saucepan, mix cold water with egg yolks; stir in combined sugars, flour, and salt.
2. Gradually add boiling water, stirring briskly. Cook, stirring, 3 to 5 minutes, or until smooth and thick.
3. Add butter and vanilla; cool for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
4. Pour into baked pie shell. Refrigerate until serving time.
5. To serve: Slice bananas over filling. Whip cream; spread over all.
